channel.title: Groupset on Mizubikes
channel.description: Recent content in Groupset on Mizubikes

item.title: SRAM 1x on a Road Bike: Is It Finally Worth It?
item.description: 1x road drivetrains are showing up more in the pro peloton. Here's what those setups actually look like, what SRAM Force XPLR changes, and whether your bike can even run it.

item.title: Why I'm Finally Thinking About Switching to SRAM
item.description: I've been on Shimano Ultegra since the R8100 launched. Here's why SRAM Force E1 is finally making me reconsider.

item.title: SRAM Eagle S-Series: One Lineup to Replace Nine Drivetrains
item.description: SRAM's new Eagle S-Series simplifies its entire mountain bike drivetrain lineup — S100, S200, and S500 replace SX through XX1 mechanical and AXS.
